name: Blood of the Ancients
description: An Eridian E-tech relic that boosts maximum health and increases carrying capacity for up to two ammo types at once. The extra durability and reserves make it especially good for sustained, ammo-hungry builds, though the added health can be a mixed blessing in fights where health-gating matters more than raw health.

special.description: Always rolls with two separate ammo capacity bonuses chosen from assault rifle, pistol, rocket launcher, shotgun, SMG, or sniper rifle ammo. It also increases maximum health.

notes: It drops from Legendary Loot Midgets.
abilities: Increases health statistics and ammo capacity.
